title: 5 Magnificent 7 Stocks Have Split Their Shares Since 2020. Only 2 Have Beaten the Market
summary: Stock splits are frequently touted as bullish catalysts that make shares more accessible to retail investors and spark fresh buying interest. title: Alphabet’s AI Future Hinges On Data Centers And Grid Utilization

The initiatives aim to support growing demand for AI services like Gemini, Search, and YouTube while managing energy costs.
